zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva verch Einion於1314年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，她的父親Baron Einion ap Celynin46歲，母親Gwenllian verch Adda4歲。她和Levan Ap David Dda至少有9個兒子。她去世於1372年享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva verch Einion于1314年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾时，她的父亲Baron Einion ap Celynin46岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Adda4岁。她和Levan Ap David Dda至少有9个儿子。她去世于1372年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Einion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Pinning (see Penning ) with -ion substituted for -in(g), perhaps through false association with the word pinion ‘wing, feather’. Compare Pinyan .

variants.name: Penning
meanings: English, Dutch, and North German: from early Middle English penning, Low German penning, Middle Dutch penninc ‘penny’ (see Penny ), a topographic name (from a field name) or a nickname referring to tax dues of a penny.
South German: from the short form, Panno, of an ancient Germanic personal name derived from a word meaning ‘ban, order, command’.
English: from a Middle English personal name Pening, Pining, presumably representing an unrecorded Old English name, a pet form perhaps of Penda or of names like Pendhere and Pendwulf.

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: When Eva verch Einion was born in 1314, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, her father, Baron Einion ap Celynin, was 46 and her mother, Gwenllian verch Adda, was 4. She had at least 9 sons with Levan Ap David Dda. She died in 1372, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva verch Einion est née en 1314, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Baron Einion ap Celynin, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Adda, avait 4 ans. Elle a eu au moins 9 fils avec Levan Ap David Dda. Elle est décédée en 1372, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva verch Einion 1314 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baron Einion ap Celynin 46 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian verch Adda 4. Sie hatte mit Levan Ap David Dda mindestens 9 Söhne. Sie starb 1372 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva verch Einionが1314年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Baron Einion ap Celyninは46歳，母Gwenllian verch Addaは4歳であった。彼女はLevan Ap David Ddaとの間に少なくとも9人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1372年に58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva verch Einion(이)가 1314년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baron Einion ap Celynin(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Adda(은)는 4세였다. 그녀는 Levan Ap David Dda(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva verch Einion родилась в 1314 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Baron Einion ap Celynin было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Adda, 4. У неё было по крайней мере 9 сыновей от Levan Ap David Dda. Она умерла в 1372 г. в возрасте 58 лет.
